entries.name: Sufi Mysticism
entries.definition: Sufi Mysticism provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.
roles: Uses Sufi Mysticism principles for empowerment
contributions: Sufi Mysticism teaches authentic self-expression in leadership
Wisdom governance balances authority with compassion
True power serves the highest good of all beings

attributes.governor_essence: A Sufi Mysticism Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by sufi mysticism principles.
